zones.source_citation: Sahuarita Town Code Ch. 18.12 (Table 18.12-2); districts established at Ch. 18.05.010
zones.notes: Rural Homestead. Min lot 180,000 sf (Table 18.12-2). Front and street-facing side 50; interior side 20; rear 50. Max building height 34 ft for all rural/residential zones. Lot coverage not specified for RH (TBD). Min lot width not specified for RH in Table 18.12-2 (TBD).

permitted: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot
Bed and breakfast (C2 noted as P in GR row)
prohibited: Manufactured home, RV or tiny home park

zones.notes: Rural Residential. Min lot 36,000 sf. Min lot width 100 ft (Table 18.12-2 'Additional Requirements'). Front and street-facing side 30; interior side 10; rear 40. Max height 34 ft. Lot coverage not specified (TBD). Classified under 'Rural' in Ch. 18.05.010.

prohibited: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot

zones.notes: Suburban Ranch. Min lot 144,000 sf. Front and street-facing side 50; interior side 10; rear 50. Max height 34 ft. Lot coverage and min lot width not specified in Table 18.12-2 (TBD). Classified under 'Rural' in Ch. 18.05.010.

prohibited: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot

zones.notes: Single Residence. Min lot 36,000 sf. Front and street-facing side 30; interior side 10; rear 40. Max height 34 ft. Lot coverage and min lot width not specified in Table 18.12-2 for R-1 (TBD).

prohibited: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot

zones.notes: Single Residence. Min lot 16,000 sf. Front and street-facing side 30; interior side 10; rear 40. Max height 34 ft. Lot coverage and min lot width not specified in Table 18.12-2 for R-2 (TBD).

prohibited: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot

zones.notes: Single Residence. Min lot 8,000 sf. Max lot coverage 60% (applies to subdivisions platted after July 1, 2023; 50% for subdivisions platted prior). Front and street-facing side 20; interior side 8; rear 25. Max height 34 ft. Min lot width not specified in Table 18.12-2 (TBD).

prohibited: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot
Manufactured home, RV or tiny home park

zones.notes: Mixed-Dwelling Type. Single-family lot min 3,500 sf; max coverage 70%. Front and street-facing side 20; interior side 5 ft detached / 0 attached (5 recorded as binding detached min); rear 15. Max height 34 ft (single-family). Multifamily (Table 18.12-3): min site area 7,000 sf, 3,500 sf per DU, height 34 ft, coverage 70%, front 20, side 10, rear 10. Min lot width not specified (TBD).

prohibited: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot
Manufactured home, RV or tiny home park

zones.notes: Multiple Residence. Single-family lot min 1,800 sf; max coverage 75%. Front and street-facing side 20; interior side 5 ft detached / 0 attached (5 recorded as binding detached min); rear 10. Single-family max height 34 ft. Multifamily (Table 18.12-3): min site area 6,000 sf, 1,800 sf per DU, max height 40 ft (recorded here as the zone's max), coverage 75%, front 20, side 10, rear 10. Min lot width not specified (TBD).

permitted: Mobile or manufactured home on an individual lot
Manufactured home, RV or tiny home park

zones.notes: Manufactured Home. Min lot area 1,500 sf per dwelling unit (Table 18.12-2). Setbacks from 'MH-1' column: front and street-facing side 20; interior side 8; rear 25. Max height 34 ft. Lot coverage and min lot width not specified in Table 18.12-2 (TBD).

Major Resort. Min site area 20 acres (871,200 sf). Max height 34 ft. Max site coverage 33%. Min site setbacks 50 ft (all sides). Max density expressed per guest room: one guest room per 4,356 sf of site area (= 10 guest rooms/acre); recorded as max_density_dua TBD because the cap is per guest room, not dwelling units. Listed uses are 'permitted' and 'accessory'; code does not provide a separate conditional/prohibited list for MR.

conditional: Bar (via restaurant w/ outdoor seating C2)

zones.notes: Neighborhood Commercial. Min lot area NONE; min lot width NONE. Max building height 34 ft. Front and street-facing side 0 (max front setback 15 ft); interior side 10 (15 adjacent to rural/residential); rear 20 (25 adjacent to rural/residential). Max lot coverage applies only to detached accessory buildings (40% of required yards); main-building coverage not specified (TBD).

conditional: Large vehicle and equipment sales and rental (C2)

zones.notes: Local Business. Min lot area NONE; min lot width NONE. Max building height 39 ft. Front and street-facing side 15; interior side 0 (10 adjacent to rural/residential); rear 10 (25 adjacent to rural/residential). Max lot coverage applies only to detached accessory buildings (40% of required yards); main-building coverage not specified (TBD).

conditional: Funeral parlors with accessory crematorium (via P)

zones.notes: General Business. Min lot area NONE; min lot width NONE. Max building height 45 ft (hospitals may exceed via Type 3 CUP, never above 90 ft). Front and street-facing side 15; interior side 0 (10 adjacent to rural/residential); rear 10 (25 adjacent to rural/residential). Max lot coverage applies only to detached accessory buildings (40% of required yards); main-building coverage not specified (TBD).

zones.source_citation: Sahuarita Town Code Sec. 18.42.040 (Table 18.42-2); density per Sec. 18.42.030(A)(1)
zones.notes: Mixed-Use. Min lot area NONE; min lot width NONE. Max building height 45 ft by right, up to 56 ft with Type 2 CUP (45 recorded as base by-right max). Front and street-facing side 5 (max front 15); interior side 10; rear 10 (25 adjacent to rural/residential). Residential permitted only in mixed-use development: multiple-family density range 15-25 du/acre per Sec. 18.42.030(A)(1); 25 recorded as the max. Min 40% of gross floor area (or 65% of each building's ground floor) reserved for nonresidential. Main-building coverage not specified (TBD).

permitted: Manufacture of cameras, dentures/drugs, jewelry, leather products, luggage, musical instruments, orthopedic/medical supplies, small paper products, plastic products, precision instruments, silverware, sporting equipment, toys
Manufacture and assembly of electrical and electronic products
Manufacture and packaging of beverage products

zones.notes: Campus Park Industrial. Min site area 10 acres (435,600 sf). Max site coverage by buildings 33%. Max building height 36 ft on sites <50 acres (and on slopes >=15%); 44 ft for sites >=50 acres (36 ft recorded as the base). Yards: front 25; sides 20 (or common wall); rear 30. Structures min 100 ft from residential zones. Secondary uses (restaurant, child care, banking, recreation, caretaker dwelling) permitted per Sec. 18.49.030(B). Min lot width not specified (TBD).

permitted: Any use permitted in B-1 or B-2
Manufacture/processing of bakery goods, candy, cosmetics, dairy, drugs, perfumes, food products (enclosed)
Manufacture of glass/pottery/ceramic, concrete products, musical instruments, toys
Automobile/RV/manufactured home assembling, painting, rebuilding, truck repair (enclosed)

zones.notes: Light Industrial/Warehousing. Min lot area NONE; min lot width NONE. Max building height 39 ft. Yards: front 15; side NONE (0); rear 10. Conditional uses section is reserved/repealed (none). Hotel use (Sec. 18.51.030(H)) carries its own standards: min lot 217,800 sf, max height 64 ft, front 50, side/rear 10 ft per story but >=30. Main-building coverage not specified (TBD); detached accessory coverage 40% of required rear yard.

permitted: Any use permitted in I-1 subsections (B), (C) and (E)
Any industrial use meeting Sec. 18.53.020(A) performance standards
Sale of products manufactured on site

zones.notes: General Industrial. Min lot area NONE (except junk/salvage uses, min 1 acre); min lot width NONE. Max building height 54 ft for industrial uses; 39 ft for nonindustrial uses (54 recorded as the zone max). Yards: front 15; side NONE (0); rear 10. Intensive/hazardous conditional uses (Sec. 18.53.040) must be >=1,320 ft from any non-I-2 zone boundary. Main-building coverage not specified (TBD); detached accessory coverage 40% of required rear yard.

permitted: Supporting and related uses in direct support of the golf course (as approved with the development plan or by town council resolution)
prohibited: Associated business, commercial and residential uses not directly in support of the golf course use

zones.source_citation: Sahuarita Town Code Ch. 18.59; listed at Ch. 18.05.010(A)(5)
zones.notes: Golf Course. Listed under 'Overlay' in Ch. 18.05.010(A)(5) but carries a restrictiveness value (Ch. 18.05.010(B)) and its own chapter; it is a superimposed zone applied over an underlying district, and the underlying zone's provisions remain applicable. Chapter 18.59 specifies design/performance and development-plan standards only - NO numeric dimensional standards (lot area, width, setbacks, height, coverage, density) are stated, so all are TBD. Established via rezoning (Ch. 18.91); effective only when the council finds construction substantially complete.
